title: AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIOS OF ANOLING, BINANDIRAHAN, CABRARAN, ILAWOD, MABUGÃA, MAGOGON, QUINUARTILAN, SOLONG, AND SUMLANG, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAMALIG, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO BARRIOS OF THE SAME MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 663 / 48 OG No. 7, 2570 (July, 1952)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 735, June 18, 1952 ]

AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIOS OF ANOLING, BINANDIRAHAN, CABRARAN, ILAWOD, MABUGÃA, MAGOGON, QUINUARTILAN, SOLONG, AND SUMLANG, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAMALIG, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO BARRIOS OF THE SAME MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Anoling, Binandirahan, Cabraran, Ilawod, Mabugña, Magogon, Quinuartilan, Solong, and Sumlang, in the municipality of Camalig, Province of Albay, are hereby converted to barrios of the same municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1952.
